summary: Tier B diagnostic external evidence. Gates, red-team closure, and implementation replication passed, but Tier A robustness criteria fail: safe subsets are not genuinely distinct, LOTO is nonsignificant, LOSO is approximately zero, negative controls match or exceed the primary direction, degradation controls failed, H3 is blocked, and NPC is boundary-only.
commands_run: sed -n reads for confirmatory, negative-control, state, NPC, replication, red-team, sign-contract, support, baseline, and freeze artifacts
apply_patch to create Tier review artifacts

key_evidence.one_line_rationale: Interpretable diagnostic alignment but no robust independent held-out increment; primary direction is nonsignificant, non-generalizing, and not IPV-specific.
failed_tier_a_criteria: directional IPV consistency in independent safe subsets
two genuinely distinct safe subsets agree
stable incremental utility over prespecified baseline
key_evidence.scope: approved top-five cohort only, N=53 primary cells; full 20-team universe not analysis-ready
key_evidence.h3: BLOCKED; no real two-human labels and excluded from Tier basis
key_evidence.allowed_framing: no robust incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was demonstrated (power-limited, top-five cohort, N=53; apparent favorable direction not IPV-specific)

spec_deviations: main_workflow.log was not updated because the worker write scope only allowed 02_process/18_tier_review plus append-only 02_process/00_meta/artifact_index.csv.
START_HERE.md was not updated because no current operating facts changed and the worker write scope did not include it.
recommended_next_codex_task: Phase 10 Nature-skill figures + offline HTML report
